findings.description: The note "`pattern` 属性に存在しないパターン番号を指定するとエラーが発生する。" is presented as an authoritative warning (注意), but the source contains this only as the user's own problem description inside the `question` admonition. The `answer` admonition provides no confirmation of this behavior — it only says "see ../all/3". Elevating a user-reported observation from the question context into an authoritative warning has no basis in the documentation answer.
findings.source_evidence: answer admonition only says ":doc:`../all/3` を参照してください。" — no documentation-level confirmation of the error behavior
